creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Listed ports have dependency on devel/py-asn1 as

RUN_DEPENDS=    ${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/pyasn1/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-asn1

however, py-asn1 doesn't install ${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/pyasn1/__init__.py.

% grep -R pyasn1/__init__.py$ /usr/ports/devel/py-asn1/pkg-plist 
%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/pyasn1/__init__.py

Fix: 

Dependency line should be fixed. Probably, to something like this:

${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}asn1>=0.0.9:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-asn1
How-To-Repeat: Install py-snmp4
